description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-side-nav

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-side-nav/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Background, active item, hover, width, collapse. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. nav landmark. aria-label. Current page. Keyboard navigation. Collapsible sections.
3. **Functionality** — Collapsible/expandable. Rail mode (icons only). Sections/groups. Active item. Nested items. Responsive (drawer on mobile).
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Collapse animation. Rail width. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Collapse. Rail. Active. Keyboard. Responsive.
8. **Storybook** — Expanded. Rail. Collapsible. With sections. Responsive.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Admin sidebar. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-side-nav
